prestazioni: ECU flash via **Unitronic Stage 2+ Software** for the **CZPA 1.4L TSI EA211** engine (250 HP / 320 Nm with **93 octane**), paired with a **CTS Turbo CTS-TURBO-CZPA-01** turbocharger upgrade (hybrid TD04HL-15T-6CM2 with billet compressor wheel, 22 PSI max boost) and **034 Motorsport High-Flow Intake Manifold** (polished runners, 30% increased airflow over stock)

Full **APR Carbon Fiber Driveshaft** (replaces stock steel unit, reducing rotational mass by 40%) and **Peloquin Limited-Slip Differential (LSD)** with 45% lockup for the **MQB-A2 platform** (direct-fit for VW Taos 4Motion models)

**KW Suspension Clubsport Coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping, 40mm front / 30mm rear lowering, **KW-specific valving for MQB-A2 chassis**) with **H&R Sway Bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear, adjustable end links) and **SuperPro Polyurethane Bushings** (full subframe, control arm, and differential mount kit)
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS-Style Front Bumper** (carbon fiber weave, integrated **Vorshlag Motorsport Canards** and **Seibon Carbon Fiber Hood** with functional heat extractor vents for the **CZPA intercooler**)

**3M 1080 Gloss Black Vinyl Wrap** with **VW Racing Line GTI-Style Side Skirts** (OEM+ fitment, **MQB-A2 specific**) and **Rear Diffuser by Maxton Design** (carbon fiber, dual exhaust cutouts for **Borla Atak 3.5" Cat-Back Exhaust** with **T304 stainless steel tips**)

**BBS CI-R 19x8.5 ET40 Wheels** (lightweight forged construction, **5x112 PCD**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect 245/35/19 tires**) with **H&R TRAK+ Wheel Spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive flush fitment and **AP Racing 355mm Front Brake Kit** (6-piston calipers, **2-piece rotors with directional vanes**)
